---
title: "Photos"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
lightbox: true
---

A few moments captured along the way. Click a photo to see it full size.

::::{.photo-gallery}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| results: asis

img_dir <- "inputs/photos/main_page"
captions_path <- file.path(img_dir, "captions.csv")

img_files <- sort(list.files(img_dir, pattern = "(?i)\\.(jpe?g|png|webp)$"))

captions <- if (file.exists(captions_path)) {
  read.csv(captions_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, colClasses = "character")
} else {
  data.frame(file = character(), caption = character())
}

get_caption <- function(f) {
  m <- captions$caption[captions$file == f]
  if (length(m) == 0 || is.na(m[1]) || !nzchar(trimws(m[1]))) "" else trimws(m[1])
}

esc <- function(x) gsub('"', "&quot;", x, fixed = TRUE)

for (f in img_files) {
  cap <- esc(get_caption(f))
  cat(sprintf(
    ':::{.photo-item data-caption="%s"}\n![%s](%s){group="main-gallery" loading="lazy"}\n:::\n\n',
    cap, cap, file.path(img_dir, f)
  ))
}
```

::::
